_readme: QA-driven exclusions found while adjudicating DISJOINT rows of reports/parity-vdu.md.
Vetoes only ever remove generated output (word moves to UNCOVERED); they never copy
a form from the VDU cache, so provenance of everything emitted stays open-source.
lemmas: all kaikki-derived cells of the lemma are skipped (entry-level data error).
words: the final dictionary entry for this word key is suppressed (single bad row).

lemmas.adomas: kaikki gives adõmas; standard Ãdomas (1st-class name) — entry accent error
lemmas.aleksa: kaikki class-2 name table (aleksàs pl.acc); standard Ãleksa keeps stem stress
lemmas.aleksas: kaikki ending-stressed aleksàs; standard Ãleksas/Alèksas keeps stem stress
lemmas.angela: kaikki name table writes ángelai (acute short a); standard Añgela
lemmas.alkanas: kaikki alkãnas; standard álkanas (class 3a, fixed initial acute)
lemmas.angelas: kaikki ángelai (acute on a short a); standard añgelas (class 1/3b)
lemmas.blogai: kaikki adverb blògai (grave long o); standard blogaĩ/blógai
lemmas.blogas: kaikki writes grave (blògas, blògą); standard blõgas/blogàs (class 4 long o)
lemmas.bomba: kaikki table is ending-stressed (bombà, bombàs); standard bòmba is class 1
lemmas.karalienė: kaikki has mobile cells (karalienè); standard karalíenė is class 1 (karalíene)
lemmas.visoks: kaikki declines mobile (visokių̃); standard visóks has fixed ó (visókių)
lemmas.dokumentas: kaikki dokumèntas (grave e); standard dokumeñtas (circumflex mixed diphthong en)
lemmas.fonema: kaikki stress class 3 yields fonemų̃; standard fonèma is class 2 (fonèmų)
lemmas.galia: kaikki writes grave (gàlios/gàlią); standard has circumflex long a (gãlios/gãlią)
lemmas.imperatorius: kaikki class 2 + imperatõrius; standard imperãtorius, fixed class 1
lemmas.jėga: kaikki class 2 yields jė̃gų; standard jėgà is class 4 (jėgų̃)
lemmas.kanada: kaikki kãnados; standard Kanãda declension stresses the second syllable
lemmas.keturi: kaikki class 3b yields keturìs; standard kẽturis (class 4 retraction)
lemmas.markas: kaikki class 1 (márkas); standard Mar̃kas/markàs — class error
lemmas.menas: kaikki class 2 yields mẽnų; standard mẽnas is class 4 (menų̃)
lemmas.modelis: loanword in -elis, not a diminutive (mòdelis); the -ẽlis rule must not fire
lemmas.nekęsti: kaikki keeps stem stress (nekeñtė); standard retracts to the negation prefix (nèkentė)
lemmas.netvarka: kaikki keeps stem stress (netvar̃ka); standard retracts to the negation prefix (nẽtvarka)
lemmas.paplūdimys: kaikki writes acute prefix (páplūdimio) in retracted cells; standard pãplūdimio
lemmas.pirmadienis: kaikki lemma accent pirmadiẽnis; standard pirmãdienis (fixed on -mã-)
lemmas.patrikas: the name Patrikas, not an -ika derivative; VDU declines it mobile (patrikaĩ)
lemmas.pirštinė: kaikki class 2 yields pirštinès; standard pir̃štinė is class 1 (pir̃štines)
lemmas.planas: kaikki class 1 keeps plãnai; standard plãnas is class 4 (planaĩ, planùs)
lemmas.savas: kaikki writes circumflex long a (sãvo); standard sàvo has a short a
lemmas.sieti: kaikki circumflex (siẽja); standard acute diphthong (síeja, síejo)
lemmas.svaras: kaikki grave (svàrų); standard circumflex long a (svãrų)
lemmas.tavas: kaikki writes circumflex long a (tãvo); standard tàvo has a short a
lemmas.tunelis: loanword in -elis, not a diminutive (tùnelis); the -ẽlis rule must not fire
lemmas.vidus: kaikki writes long ĩ (vĩdų); standard vìdų has a short i (class 4)
lemmas.žmona: kaikki circumflex in retracted cells (žmõną); standard acute (žmóną)

words.agentė: suffix rule gives ageñtė (like ageñtas); VDU answers ãgentė — NORM-DELTA, pending adjudication
words.ginčytis: verb infinitive that parses as an -ytis diminutive of giñčas; suffix rule must not answer
words.lyg: closed-class draft carries lỹg; dictionaries give lýg — pending VLKK adjudication
words.miegot: kaikki apocope row miẽgot; standard shortening keeps the acute (miegót)
words.niekur: closed-class draft carries niekur̃; standard niẽkur — pending VLKK adjudication
words.rodos: kaikki particle entry rõdos; standard ródos (from ródosi)
words.vesiu: kaikki writes long ẽ in vesti s-stem cells (vẽsiu); standard short è (vèsiu)
words.vesk: kaikki writes long ẽ in vesti s-stem cells (vẽsk); standard short è (vèsk)
